description: Benchmark tests for branch-finisher skill - Post-branch-development cleanup and completion flow

evals.name: test-verification
evals.prompt: 验证分支 feature/backend/TASK-101-user-auth 的所有测试是否通过，branch_type=feature, module=backend

assertions.name: runs_test_suite
assertions.description: Should indicate running the test suite

assertions.name: reports_pass_status
assertions.description: Should report test pass/fail status clearly

assertions.name: identifies_branch
assertions.description: Should reference the branch being tested

assertions.name: removes_worktree
assertions.description: Should execute git worktree remove command
assertions.check: output.includes('worktree') && (output.includes('remove') || output.includes('删除') || output.includes('cleanup') || output.includes('清理'))

assertions.name: confirms_cleanup
assertions.description: Should confirm worktree has been cleaned up
assertions.check: output.includes('success') || output.includes('成功') || output.includes('done') || output.includes('完成') || output.includes('removed')

assertions.name: references_worktree_path
assertions.description: Should reference the worktree path being removed

evals.name: four-option-completion
evals.prompt: 分支开发完成，提供完成选项: branch=feature/backend/TASK-101-user-auth, tests=passed, show_options=true

assertions.name: presents_merge_option
assertions.description: Should present merge as a completion option

assertions.name: presents_pr_option
assertions.description: Should present PR creation as a completion option

evals.name: branch-status-check
evals.prompt: 检查分支 feature/backend/TASK-101-user-auth 是否准备好完成: check_uncommitted=true, check_upstream=true, check_tests=true

assertions.name: checks_uncommitted_changes
assertions.description: Should verify no uncommitted changes remain
assertions.check: output.includes('uncommitted') || output.includes('未提交') || output.includes('clean') || output.includes('working tree')

assertions.name: checks_upstream_sync
assertions.description: Should verify branch is synced with upstream
